commands.start.title: Port Bridge: Start Remote
commands.stop.title: Port Bridge: Stop Remote
commands.restart.title: Port Bridge: Restart Remote
commands.reconnectControl.title: Port Bridge: Reconnect Control Channel
commands.showRemoteStatus.title: Port Bridge: Show Remote Status
configuration.autoStart.description: Start configured port bridges automatically in remote windows.
configuration.mappings.description: Local-to-remote port mappings. Each mapping is an object so it can be named, disabled, and customized without deleting configuration.
configuration.mapping.enabled.descriptio: Whether this mapping is active. Defaults to true.
configuration.mapping.name.description: Stable mapping name. Defaults to port-<localPort>.
configuration.mapping.port.description: Port to use for both localPort and remotePort unless they are explicitly set.
configuration.mapping.localHost.descript: Host on the local machine to connect to.
configuration.mapping.localPort.descript: Port on the local machine to connect to.
configuration.mapping.remoteSocket.descr: Unix socket path to create in the remote workspace. Defaults to /tmp/vscode-port-bridge/<name>.sock.
configuration.mapping.remoteHost.descrip: Remote host/interface for the TCP listener.
configuration.mapping.remotePort.descrip: TCP port to listen on in the remote workspace.
configuration.controlReconnectDelayMs.de: Delay before recreating the internal control tunnel after it is closed.
